description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a warm tan-brown upholstered seat and backrest, featuring a smooth, continuous curve that forms integrated armrests. The seat is generously padded, providing comfort and support, and the backrest is mid-height with a gentle backward slope for ergonomic seating. The chair sits atop a black, five-pointed star base equipped with small casters for mobility. A central black support column connects the seat to the base, likely made of metal for stability and strength. The upholstery appears to be faux leather or vinyl, giving the chair a sleek, matte finish. This chair is suitable for office, meeting, or lounge areas in urban environments.
description: A tan-brown upholstered swivel chair with integrated armrests, a mid-height curved back, and a black five-star wheeled base. The chair has a sleek, modern design with a comfortable padded seat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved seat and backrest with integrated armrests and the open space beneath the armrest area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's thick seat padding, the backward slope of the backrest, and the visible black support column and casters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrest and the full width of the chair's back, as well as the five-pointed base.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the chair's contoured shape, armrest integration, and the sturdy base with casters.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, cylindrical metal column connecting the seat to the five-pointed base, likely fixed and sturdy.
attribute_seat_back_design: Mid-height, gently curved backrest with integrated armrests, upholstered in tan synthetic leather, smooth and unpatterned.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the seat and back, upholstered in the same material, seamlessly attached.
